summary: A consulting master services agreement between Meridian Health Systems and Atlas Strategic Advisors, billed hourly with specific work ordered through individual Statements of Work.

parties.name: Meridian Health Systems, Inc.
parties.evidence_quote: Meridian Health Systems, Inc., a New York corporation

parties.name: Atlas Strategic Advisors LLC
parties.evidence_quote: Atlas Strategic Advisors LLC, a New York limited liability company

key_details.label: Term
key_details.value: 12 months initial, auto-renewing for successive 12-month terms
key_details.evidence_quote: The initial term of this Agreement is twelve (12) months from the Effective Date. Thereafter, the Agreement shall automatically renew for successive twelve (12) month terms

key_details.label: Rate
key_details.value: USD $250.00 per hour unless an SOW specifies otherwise
key_details.evidence_quote: billed at the rate of two hundred fifty U.S. dollars (USD $250.00) per hour

key_details.label: Services
key_details.value: Consulting services as described in one or more Statements of Work
key_details.evidence_quote: Provider shall perform consulting services for Client as described in one or more Statements of Work

key_details.label: IP ownership
key_details.value: Client owns deliverables produced under an SOW; Provider retains its pre-existing tools
key_details.evidence_quote: Client shall own all right, title, and interest in and to the deliverables specifically produced for Client under an SOW

key_details.label: Termination
key_details.value: 30 days' notice for convenience; immediate for uncured material breach or insolvency
key_details.evidence_quote: Either Party may terminate this Agreement or any individual SOW for convenience upon thirty (30) days' prior written notice

key_details.label: Governing law
key_details.evidence_quote: laws of the State of New York, without regard to its conflict of laws principles

key_details.label: Limitation of liability
key_details.value: Capped at fees paid in the trailing 12 months; no indirect or consequential damages
key_details.evidence_quote: aggregate liability arising out of or in connection with this agreement shall not exceed the total fees paid by client to provider in the twelve (12) months preceding the claim
